scripts.build:remotes: npm run build -w mfe-auth && npm run build -w mfe-community && npm run build -w mfe-events
scripts.start: npm run build:remotes && npx concurrently -n auth,community,events,shell -c blue,green,yellow,cyan "npm run preview -w mfe-auth" "npm run preview -w mfe-community" "npm run preview -w mfe-events" "npm run dev -w shell"
scripts.build: npm run build:remotes && npm run build -w shell
